locations.name: Galata Tower
locations.description: Built in 1348, this tower offers 360-degree views.

locations.name: Istiklal Street
locations.description: 1.4km pedestrian street with shops and cafes.

locations.name: Pera Museum
locations.description: Art museum focused on Orientalist painting.
locations.bestComment: The Tortoise Trainer is a must-see.

locations.name: Flower Passage
locations.description: Historic arcade with restaurants and pubs.

locations.name: Saint Antoine Church
locations.description: Largest Catholic church in Istanbul.
locations.bestComment: Peaceful place in the middle of chaos.

locations.name: Nevizade Street
locations.description: Famous street for mezes and nightlife.
locations.bestComment: Best place for a long night with friends.

locations.name: Salt Beyoglu
locations.description: Contemporary art and research center.

locations.name: Sahika
locations.description: A safe club for queer people.

locations.name: Moda Seaside
locations.description: Perfect place to watch the Marmara Sea.
locations.bestComment: Best spot to relax with a coffee.

locations.name: Barlar Sokagi
locations.description: Vibrant nightlife and diverse pubs.

locations.name: Akmar Passage
locations.description: Historic second-hand book shops.

locations.name: Haydarpasa Station
locations.description: Neo-renaissance railway station icon.

locations.name: Sureyya Opera House
locations.description: The first musical theater on the Asian side.

locations.name: Kadikoy Fish Market
locations.description: Traditional street market for fresh food.

locations.name: Bagdat Avenue
locations.description: High-end shopping street (14km long).

locations.name: Dolmabahce Palace
locations.description: Residence of Ottoman Sultans and Ataturk.

locations.name: Carsi
locations.description: Dynamic center with markets and food.

locations.name: Maritime Museum
locations.description: Largest naval museum in Turkey.

locations.name: Yildiz Park
locations.description: Huge historic park with pavilions.

locations.name: Ortakoy Mosque
locations.description: Baroque mosque right on the Bosphorus.
locations.bestComment: Eat kumpir while watching the view.

locations.name: Ihlamur Pavilion
locations.description: Former imperial summer residence.

locations.name: Hagia Sophia
locations.description: Marvel of Byzantine architecture.

locations.name: Grand Bazaar
locations.description: One of the oldest covered markets.

locations.name: Topkapi Palace
locations.description: Primary residence of the Ottoman Sultans.
locations.bestComment: The Harem section is very interesting.

locations.name: Blue Mosque
locations.description: Famous for its blue tiles and 6 minarets.

locations.name: Basilica Cistern
locations.description: Subterranean Roman water reservoir.

locations.name: Suleymaniye Mosque
locations.description: Masterpiece of Mimar Sinan.

locations.name: Chora Church
locations.description: Byzantine mosaics and frescoes.
locations.bestComment: Best mosaic art in the world.

locations.name: Emirgan Park
locations.description: Famous for the Tulip Festival.
locations.bestComment: Go in April for the tulip blossoms.

locations.name: Rumeli Fortress
locations.description: Built to control the Bosphorus traffic.
locations.bestComment: Hard climb but worth the view.

locations.name: Ataturk Arboretum
locations.description: Living tree museum with lakes.

locations.name: Istinye Park
locations.description: High-end shopping mall with open court.

locations.name: Sadberk Hanim Museum
locations.description: Private museum in a historic mansion.

locations.name: Galataport
locations.description: Modern cruise terminal and mall.
locations.bestComment: Walking by the sea is great.

locations.name: Istanbul Modern
locations.description: Modern and contemporary art museum.
locations.bestComment: Renzo Piano's building is a work of art.

locations.name: Cicek Pasaji
locations.description: Historic passage for dining.
